strings.gameplay_instructions:
Move with WASD or the arrow keys.
Press M to toggle the title marker.
Press Escape to return.

descriptions.launch_boot_label: Developer-facing boot label. This is intentionally obvious in the template build.
descriptions.launch_loading_assets: Shown while public game assets are loading.
descriptions.launch_timer: Shown while the launch scene holds for its minimum visual-test duration.
descriptions.new_game: Start a fresh template gameplay session. Developer key: new_game.
descriptions.continue_game: Continue from the newest valid save file. Hidden until a save system exists. Developer key: continue_game.
descriptions.load_game: Open the load-game panel inside the persistent title scene. Developer key: load_game.
descriptions.settings: Open the settings category menu while keeping the title scene active. Developer key: settings.
descriptions.quit_game: Exit the Electron application through the platform bridge. Developer key: quit_game.
descriptions.back: Return to the previous menu panel. Developer key: back.
descriptions.no_save_files_found: Shown when the load-game panel has no save files to display. Developer key: no_save_files_found.
descriptions.gameplay_settings: Open gameplay-related settings, including template launch-screen and marker toggles. Developer key: gameplay_settings.
descriptions.graphics_settings: Open graphics-related settings such as frame-rate and rendering options. Developer key: graphics_settings.
descriptions.audio_settings: Open audio-related settings such as volume and mute options. Developer key: audio_settings.
descriptions.display_settings: Open display-related settings such as window mode and resolution. Developer key: display_settings.
descriptions.accessibility_settings: Open accessibility-related settings such as text scale, contrast, and motion options. Developer key: accessibility_settings.
descriptions.settings_coming_soon: This settings category exists in the menu structure but its controls have not been implemented yet. Developer key: settings_coming_soon.
descriptions.fps_limit: Cycle the active foreground frame-rate cap. Zero means unlimited FPS. Developer key: fps_limit.
descriptions.background_fps_limit: Cycle the frame-rate cap used when the app is unfocused or hidden. Developer key: background_fps_limit.
descriptions.unlimited_fps: Label used when the foreground FPS limit is set to zero. Developer key: unlimited_fps.
descriptions.fps_value: Formats a numeric frame-rate option. Developer key: fps_value.
descriptions.master_volume: Cycle the saved master volume value. Runtime audio mixing will be wired separately. Developer key: master_volume.
descriptions.music_volume: Cycle the saved music volume value. Runtime music volume will be wired separately. Developer key: music_volume.
descriptions.sfx_volume: Cycle the saved sound-effects volume value. Runtime SFX volume will be wired separately. Developer key: sfx_volume.
descriptions.ui_volume: Cycle the saved UI sound volume value. Runtime UI sound volume will be wired separately. Developer key: ui_volume.
descriptions.mute_all: Toggle the saved mute-all audio setting. Runtime mute behavior will be wired separately. Developer key: mute_all.
descriptions.mute_when_unfocused: Toggle the saved mute-when-unfocused audio setting. Runtime mute behavior will be wired separately. Developer key: mute_when_unfocused.
descriptions.percent_value: Formats a percentage setting value. Developer key: percent_value.
descriptions.gameplay_instructions: Instruction text for the default test gameplay scene. Developer key: gameplay_instructions.
descriptions.title_marker: Status label for the title marker setting. Developer key: title_marker.
descriptions.pipeline_marker: Toggle the title-screen pipeline marker used by template developers. Developer key: pipeline_marker.
descriptions.launch_screen: Toggle the developer-facing launch/loading screen. Developer key: launch_screen.
